mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM qna WHERE writer = #{userId} AND parent_id IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO qna (writer, q_content, is_answered) VALUES (#{writer}, #{q_content}, false)
mapper.select: SELECT q.qno AS question_id, q.writer AS question_writer, q.q_content, q.qna_date AS question_date, q.is_answered, a.qno AS answer_id, a.writer AS answer_writer, a.a_content, a.qna_date AS answer_date FROM qna q LEFT JOIN qna a ON q.qno = a.parent_id WHERE q.qno = #{qno} AND q.writer = #{userId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM qna WHERE qno = #{qno} OR parent_id = #{qno}
